modules.datatypes_legacy.utils package#

Submodules#

modules.datatypes_legacy.utils.reconstruct_reader module#

Functions for creating Python objects from RECONSTRUCT XML files.

extract_image_attributes(node)[source]#
extract_section_attributes(node)[source]#
extract_section_contour_attributes(node)[source]#

Return a dict of Section Contour’s attributes.

extract_series_attributes(node)[source]#
extract_series_contour_attributes(node)[source]#

Return a dict of Series’ Contour’s attributes.

extract_transform_attributes(node)[source]#
extract_zcontour_attributes(node)[source]#
process_section_file(path, data_check=False)[source]#

Return a Section object from a Section XML file.

process_series_directory(path, data_check=False, progbar=None)[source]#

Return a Series, fully loaded with data found in the provided path.

process_series_file(path)[source]#

Return a Series object from Series XML file.

str_to_bool(string)[source]#

Converts str to str_to_bool(bool.

modules.datatypes_legacy.utils.reconstruct_writer module#

Functions for writing to RECONSTRUCT XML files.

entire_section_to_xml(section)[source]#
entire_series_to_xml(series)[source]#
image_to_contour_xml(image)[source]#
image_to_xml(image)[source]#
section_contour_to_xml(contour)[source]#
section_to_xml(section)[source]#
series_contour_to_xml(contour)[source]#
series_to_xml(series)[source]#
transform_to_xml(transform)[source]#
write_section(section, directory, outpath=None, overwrite=False)[source]#

Writes <section> to an XML file in directory

write_series(series, directory, outpath=None, sections=False, overwrite=False, progbar=None)[source]#

Writes <series> to an XML file in directory

zcontour_to_xml(zcontour)[source]#
